faq_pool.q: What is coliving in {location}?
faq_pool.a: Coliving is a modern housing concept where you rent a private, furnished room in a professionally managed shared home. At {property} in {location}, this means your own room plus shared kitchen, common areas, and amenities — all included in one weekly price from {price}.

faq_pool.q: How much does coliving cost in {location}?
faq_pool.a: Rooms at {property} in {location} start from {price}/week ({monthly}/month). All utilities, WiFi, and furnishings are included — no hidden fees. That's 38-60% less than a solo apartment in the same area.

faq_pool.q: Who lives in coliving spaces in {location}?
faq_pool.a: Our community at {property} includes international students, young professionals, and newcomers to Toronto. It's a diverse mix of people who value intentional community over chaotic roommate situations.

faq_pool.q: What's the minimum lease for coliving in {location}?
faq_pool.a: Just 1 month. We offer flexible terms from 1 month to 12+ months. No long-term commitment required — perfect for students, interns, and professionals in transition.

faq_pool.q: Do I need a credit check for coliving?
faq_pool.a: No. Circle Co-Living does not require Canadian credit history. Apply online, get approved within 48 hours, and move in as soon as this week.

faq_pool.q: What amenities are included at {property}?
faq_pool.a: {amenities_list}. All common areas and building amenities are shared with your fellow community members.

faq_pool.q: Is coliving better than renting an apartment in {location}?
faq_pool.a: For many people, yes. Coliving saves you 38-60% compared to a solo apartment, includes all utilities and furniture, offers flexible leases, and provides a built-in community. No furniture shopping, no separate utility bills, no isolation.

faq_pool.q: How do I apply for coliving in {location}?
faq_pool.a: Apply online in 3 simple steps: submit your application (2 minutes), get approved (within 48 hours), and move in. No lengthy paperwork or guarantor required.
